Privacy Policy

JiKnit App Privacy Policy

中文 English
Last Updated: June 12, 2026

JiKnit ("we", "us", or "our") values your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal information. Please read this policy carefully before using our app.

1. Information We Collect

We may collect the following types of information:

1.1 Information You Provide

  • Project Data: Knitting project names, part information, row counts, chart content, etc.
  • Yarn Inventory: Yarn brand, color, material, quantity, and other details you enter
  • Calendar Events: Knitting reminders, deadlines, and other schedule items
  • Images: Knitting charts, project photos, and other images you upload

1.2 Automatically Collected Information

  • Device Information: Device model, operating system version, unique device identifier
  • Usage Data: Feature usage frequency, crash logs, performance data
  • Subscription Information: Subscription status processed through RevenueCat (payment information not included)

2. How We Use Your Information

We use the collected information to:

  • Provide, maintain, and improve the core functionality of the app
  • Sync your data to iCloud (if enabled)
  • Provide system extensions such as Widgets and Live Activity
  • Process in-app purchases and subscription management
  • Analyze app performance, fix bugs, and improve user experience
  • Send notifications related to your usage (e.g., knitting reminders)

3. Data Storage

3.1 Local Storage

All your knitting project data, yarn inventory, and calendar events are stored locally on your device. We do not upload this data to any server by default.

3.2 iCloud Sync

If you enable iCloud sync, your data will be synchronized across your devices through Apple's iCloud service. This process is governed by Apple's Privacy Policy.

3.3 Data Backup

We provide manual export/import functionality, allowing you to export your data as files for local backup.

4. Information Sharing

We do not sell, rent, or otherwise disclose your personal information to third parties, except:

  • With your explicit consent
  • To comply with applicable laws or respond to lawful requests
  • To protect our rights, property, or safety

5. Third-Party Services

This app uses the following third-party services:

  • RevenueCat: Used for in-app purchase and subscription management. RevenueCat may collect device identifiers and subscription status. See RevenueCat Privacy Policy.
  • Apple App Store: Used for app distribution and in-app purchase processing. See Apple Privacy Policy.

6. Data Security

We take reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect your data:

  • All data is stored locally on your device, reducing data breach risks
  • We use iOS system-provided secure storage mechanisms (Keychain, App Group, etc.)
  • Regular app updates to fix security vulnerabilities

7. Your Rights

You have the following rights:

  • Access: View all data stored in the app at any time
  • Correction: Modify or update your project information
  • Deletion: Delete any project, yarn record, or calendar event
  • Portability: Export your data as files
  • Withdraw Consent: Stop using the app and delete it to clear all local data

8. Children's Privacy

This app is not intended for children under 13. If you are a parent or guardian and believe your child has provided us with personal information, please contact us and we will take steps to delete such information.

9. Policy Updates

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. The updated policy will be posted within the app and on this page with the update date. Significant changes will be notified through in-app notifications.

10. Contact Us

If you have any questions or suggestions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us:

  • Email: support@jiknit.app

© 2026 JiKnit. All rights reserved.

Terms of Service | Privacy Policy
